description: Rogue Frontier Patch 5 (7 April 2025) — New Crystal Weapons, Season 27 Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: New Crystal Weapons

items.text: Flamewalker Staff (Fire Staff): Spontaneous Combustion transforms you into a raging fireball, flying towards your enemies and dealing damage to those in your path
Forgebark Staff (Nature Staff): Dual Nature allows you to switch between fortifying your allies and ensnaring your enemies
Arclight Blasters (Crossbow): Flickershots unleashes a barrage of energy bolts as you spin through the air, dealing damage and increasing your resistances

sections.heading: Season 27 Changes

subsections.heading: Treasures

items.text: Might needed per Level: 13,000 → 10,400

subsections.searchable_text: Treasures Might needed per Level: 13,000 → 10,400 Season Points per Level: 20 → 16

subsections.heading: Crystal Creatures

items.text: Might needed per Level: 6,000 → 4,000

subsections.searchable_text: Crystal Creatures Might needed per Level: 6,000 → 4,000 Season Points per Level: 30 → 20

subsections.heading: Smugglers

items.text: Might needed per Level: 34,000 → 27,200

items.text: Might needed per Level: 3,500 → 2,700

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Smuggler Crates are now visible on the minimap to everyone in the same region
Players can now send only one message every two seconds in the following chat channels
The following automated chat message has been changed

subitems.text: “Player x has committed suicide.” → “Player x has died.”

items.text: Text entered in the Marketplace UI search box now carries over when switching between the Buy and Buy Order tabs
The Kills and Deaths tabs in the Player Stats UI now remember the previous dropdown selection on opening

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Smuggler Crates are now visible on the minimap to everyone in the same region Players can now send only one message every two seconds in the following chat channels Say Whisper Help Faction Faction Local All language channels The following automated chat message has been changed “Player x has committed suicide.” → “Player x has died.” Text entered in the Marketplace UI search box now carries over when switching between the Buy and Buy Order tabs The Kills and Deaths tabs in the Player Stats UI now remember the previous dropdown selection on opening

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here .
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here .

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Spinning Blades (Dual Swords): Fixed issue where immunity to Crowd Control persisted after impact
Holy Beam (Holy Staffs): Fixed issue where stacks persisted after casting was interrupted
Razor Cut (Bear Paws): Fixed issue where the same enemy could be hit multiple times
Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staffs): Fixed issue where frozen enemies could still receive healing from lifesteal effects

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Spinning Blades (Dual Swords): Fixed issue where immunity to Crowd Control persisted after impact Holy Beam (Holy Staffs): Fixed issue where stacks persisted after casting was interrupted Razor Cut (Bear Paws): Fixed issue where the same enemy could be hit multiple times Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staffs): Fixed issue where frozen enemies could still receive healing from lifesteal effects

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the Arena queue timer would not reappear if a player canceled the match invitation
Fixed issue where combat logs in the Death Recap would be overwritten by new actions performed on the player when switching tabs in the UI
Fixed issue where the ‘Take All’ button on the Marketplace would reset filters without resetting the filter text

subitems.text: The text is now reset along with the filters

items.text: [MOBILE] Fixed issue where main dynamic action button on the virtual controller could appear to remain in motion after use
[CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where ‘Select Next Party Member’ keybinding option was missing from the Settings menu

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where the Arena queue timer would not reappear if a player canceled the match invitation Fixed issue where combat logs in the Death Recap would be overwritten by new actions performed on the player when switching tabs in the UI Fixed issue where the ‘Take All’ button on the Marketplace would reset filters without resetting the filter text The text is now reset along with the filters [MOBILE] Fixed issue where main dynamic action button on the virtual controller could appear to remain in motion after use [CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where ‘Select Next Party Member’ keybinding option was missing from the Settings menu

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed Faction Warfare “connection bug”; it is now always possible to capture Outposts in a region if at least one adjacent frontline or backline region is owned by your Faction
Fixed issue where it was possible for players to buy their own items at the Marketplace
Fixed issue where Rock Giant’s Aspect would not pursue players or use melee attacks
